history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, tousled hair and glasses stands in an urban setting at night. He is wearing a loose-fitting, cream-colored crewneck sweatshirt with his hands in his pockets, and dark trousers. The background shows a dimly lit street with yellow lane markings. Above and behind him, there are several illuminated signs, including one with a large "C" and Japanese characters, and another with "GAP" visible. Trees with some autumn foliage are also present. The lighting is atmospheric and moody, with the streetlights and signs casting a soft glow on the scene, creating a sense of quiet solitude and urban coolness. The color palette is dominated by dark blues and blacks, with contrasting pops of yellow from the road markings and the warm light from the signs. The overall mood is contemplative and slightly melancholic, capturing a moment of reflection in the city at night.
